---
name: Mod Suggestion
about: Suggest a new mod to include in the pack
title: "[Mod Suggestion] "
labels: ["mod-suggestion"]
assignees: []
---

## Type

- [ ] Add a new mod to the pack
- [ ] Replace an existing mod with this one

## The Mod

- **Mod name:**
- **Current NeoForge release for MC 26.1.2:** <!-- must have a real 26.1.2 build -->
- **Link (CurseForge preferred / GitHub):**
- **License:** <!-- must allow redistribution in a modpack; CF-sourced is cleanest -->

## Why It Fits

<!-- The pack is intentionally curated. Suggestions are evaluated against:
       (a) does this supply a resource tier or content the frog loop can use?
       (b) does this strengthen the AE2 + Powah logistics/power spine?
       (c) does this round out survival QoL without bloating load time?
     Pitches that don't match one of those usually get declined. -->

## Alternatives Already in the Pack

<!-- Does an existing pack mod already cover this role? If so, why is the new mod
     better for it? Avoid pure overlap. -->

## Maintenance Cost

<!-- Each added mod is a maintenance and load-time tax. Be honest about:
       - How frequently does this mod update?
       - Does it have a track record of breaking changes between MC versions?
       - Does it depend on other mods we'd also need to ship?
       - Is it on CurseForge (clean manifest export) or Modrinth-only? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, video, or "I ran a test with this added on top and it played
     well" notes are all welcome. -->
